summary: PopBet iter4 (release-ready features) — full backend + frontend pass. Backend: new /app/backend/tests/test_popbet_iter4.py has 14/14 passing (forgot/reset flow, change-password, PATCH /api/profile, DELETE /api/account, all happy + error paths). Iter2 regression 18/18 still green. Frontend: end-to-end walked forgot→reset→auto-login (lands on /(tabs)), Settings shows new 'Konto — edycja' + Legal + 'Strefa niebezpieczna' sections, edit-profile updates username+phone (verified via /me), change-password shows 'Hasło zmienione ✅' toast + login works with new pw, /legal renders Regulamin + Polityka prywatności + Kontakt cards, /delete-account with ack+password returns user to /onboarding with 'Konto usunięte' toast (subsequent login → 401). Markets empty category (Muzyka) renders new EmptyState (emoji + title + subtitle + 'Zobacz wszystkie' CTA). MyBets empty state renders new 🎯 + 'Brak aktywnych zakładów'. Placing a bet reduces coin balance and shows 'Obstawione' locked card. Toast provider working across all destructive flows. Deprecated console warnings (shadow*, pointerEvents) persist — carry-over from iter2.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Still emitted on every screen load. Reference: /app/frontend/src/theme/colors.ts and shadow consumers (carry-over from iter2 iteration_3.json action_items).
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx reward overlay (carry-over from iter2).

action_items: (Nice-to-have) Migrate deprecated shadow* → boxShadow in /app/frontend/src/theme/colors.ts and downstream consumers (persists from iter2/iter3 as unaddressed).
(Nice-to-have) Move pointerEvents='none' from prop to style in /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx reward overlay (persists from iter2).
(Legacy) /app/backend/tests/test_popbet_backend.py (iter1) still references the removed POST /api/friends/add endpoint — delete or migrate to /api/friends/request+accept.

(Optional) forgot_password endpoint returns delivery:'email' when the email is unknown but delivery:'in_app' when known — this is a mild info-leak vector (client can distinguish). If tightening is desired, always return the same delivery string. Not blocking release.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:474 forgot_password uses uuid.uuid4().hex + uuid.uuid4().hex[:8] (40 hex chars = 160 bits) — good entropy.
server.py:497 reset_password guards used/expired tokens correctly and re-fetches user after update before issuing JWT — clean.
server.py:520 change_password rejects same-as-current with 400 before hashing — good.
server.py:534 update_profile handles username-uniqueness with 409, phone_normalized recomputed symmetrically with signup path, avatar accepts both bare-b64 and data-URI — good.

server.py:564 delete_account cascades placements/friendships/friend_requests/password_resets/transfers before removing the user document — GDPR-friendly. Consider also deleting from db.push_tokens if it lives outside the users doc (currently push_tokens is embedded in user, so it goes away with the user delete — fine).
forgot_password: 'delivery' field is 'email' for unknown users but 'in_app' for known ones (server.py:481 vs 494) — minor info-leak channel (see action_items).
delete-account UI: /app/frontend/app/delete-account.tsx correctly requires password for non-Google users and ack checkbox — matches backend contract.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of iter4 flows tested (forgot→reset→login, settings sections, edit-profile, change-password, legal, delete-account, empty state on empty market category, my-bets empty state, bet placement via API)

seed_data_creation: Per test, a throwaway account (TEST_iter4_<uuid>@popbet.dev or ui_iter4_<uuid>@popbet.dev) is created via /api/auth/signup. UI test users are cleaned up as part of the delete-account test where relevant; other TEST_iter4 users remain in DB but are prefixed for easy identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter4 test file is /app/backend/tests/test_popbet_iter4.py — reuse for future regressions. Toast provider verified working (change-password and delete-account both surface success toasts). Empty-state UI verified on Muzyka category (had no bets). Deprecated shadow*/pointerEvents warnings still emitted on every screen — main agent has been notified for three iterations now. streaker1@popbet.com password NOT touched (all destructive tests used throwaway ui_iter4_* accounts as instructed).
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature iteration, no bugs found. Two test-only failures were self-inflicted (assumed non-lowercased email and used the same user's token to look up their own phone via find-by-phones which excludes self); fixed and all green.
